instructions: Tritura las galletas hasta obtener textura pulverizada.

Pass the mixture to a 22 cm demoldable mold and press right at the bottom to stick up very well.

tender-and-juicy-instant-pot-pork-tender.name: Tender And Juicy Instant Pot Pork Tenderloin

ingredients.item: Cube tomato bouillon with chicken flavoring

instructions: Stir hot water and tomato bouillon in a small bowl until dissolved.
Mix garlic powder, oregano, thyme, salt, and cayenne pepper together in a small bowl. Rub seasoning all over pork tenderloin until coated.

Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot) and select Saute function. Add olive oil and heat until shimmering, 3 to 5 minutes. Add smashed garlic and cook until fragrant and oil is infused with garlic flavor, 1 to 2 minutes. Transfer garlic to a small bowl.

Add pork tenderloin to the pot and cook until browned, about 2 minutes per side. Pour tomato bouillon into the pot and bring to a boil while scraping any browned bits of pork off the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon. Add garlic cloves back to the pot.
Close and lock the lid. Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 0 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.

Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 10 minutes. As soon as the pressure pin drops, unlock and remove the lid. Lift out tenderloin and cover with 2 layers of aluminum foil; allow to rest for 3 minutes before slicing. After resting, pork should be slightly pink in the center and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 63°C (63 degrees C).

Meanwhile, mix cold water and cornstarch together in a small bowl to make a slurry. Add slurry to the Instant Pot. Select Saute function and simmer until sauce has thickened, about 3 minutes. Drizzle sauce over sliced pork.

thai-compound-butter.name: Thai Compound Butter
instructions: Process all ingredients in a food processor until smooth.
DO AHEAD: Butter can be made 5 days ahead. Wrap tightly and chill, or freeze up to 1 month.

the-champagne-cocktail.name: The Champagne Cocktail

ingredients.item: The truth old time aromatic bitters or angostura bitters

instructions: Drop 1 dash The Truth Old Time Aromatic Bitters or Angostura bitters onto a sugar cube and place in a Champagne flute. Using a channel or paring knife, cut a 6" twist from a lemon and arrange inside glass. Gently pour 5 ounces chilled Champagne into glass.

timbales.name: Timbales
instructions: Heat oil in deep-fryer or heavy deep skillet to 191°C (190 degrees C).
In a medium bowl, whisk together the evaporated milk, sugar, salt, water and egg. Gradually mix in the flour.
Dip a rosette iron into the batter, then into the hot oil. Fry until golden, and drain on paper towels. Dust with confectioners' sugar before completely cool.

tinas-holiday-mashed-potatoes.name: Tina's Holiday Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Fill a large stockpot with water. Add potatoes, chicken bouillon, and rosemary. Bring to a boil. Cover and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes.

Drain potatoes and place in a large bowl. Add cheese, milk, sour cream, and butter; beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Mix in green onions, garlic, salt, and pepper. Transfer mashed potatoes to a serving dish.

toasted-barley-salad-with-broccoli.name: Toasted Barley Salad With Broccoli
instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a small pot over medium heat. Add barley and toast, stirring occasionally, until golden, about 5 minutes. Add 3 cups water and bring to a boil; season with salt. Cook until tender, 25–30 minutes.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet. Add garlic and anchovy and cook , stirring occasionally, until garlic is just golden,, about 2 minutes. Add broccoli; season with salt and pepper and cook until crisp-tender and bright green, 8–10 minutes. Add barley and cook, tossing until warmed through. Add vinegar; season with salt, pepper, and more vinegar, if desired. Mix in parsley and almonds just before serving.

tomatillo-salsa-verde.name: Tomatillo Salsa Verde

ingredients.prep: seeds removed if desired, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Purée tomatillos, onion, garlic, chile, and cilantro in a blender, adding water as needed, until smooth; season with salt.

tomato-and-cucamelon-salsa.name: Tomato And Cucamelon Salsa
instructions: Combine onion and lime juice in a bowl; marinate for 15 minutes.
Stir tomatoes, cucamelons, chile pepper, chili powder, and salt into onion; toss to combine. Taste; add brown sugar. Chill until ready to serve.

tomato-paste-for-breakfast-lezzet.name: Tomato Paste For Breakfast

tomato-onion-and-roasted-lemon-salad.name: Tomato, Onion, And Roasted Lemon Salad

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, thinly sliced, seeds removed

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: such as Sun Gold, cherry, or heirloom, halved

ingredients.item: Fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves with tender stems
Pomegranate molasses is available at middle eastern markets and some grocery stores

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Cook lemon slices in a medium saucepan of boiling water 2 minutes to remove bitterness. Drain and pat dry.

Gently toss lemon slices with sage, sugar, and 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl. Spread out on a parchment-lined baking sheet and bake until lemons are no longer wet and only slightly colored, 15–20 minutes. Let cool.

Whisk pomegranate molasses, allspice, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add lemons, tomatoes, onion, parsley, mint, and sprouts, if using, and toss gently; season with salt and pepper.

tomato-watermelon-salad.name: Tomato-watermelon Salad

ingredients.prep: preferably yellow, rind removed, flesh cut into  0.5" pieces (about 4 cups)

instructions: Heat coconut oil, peppercorns, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, and turmeric in a small saucepan over medium until fragrant, about 3 minutes. Let turmeric oil cool slightly.
Arrange watermelon, tomato, and feta on a platter. Drizzle turmeric oil evenly over and sprinkle with salt.

top-10-blw-burgers-for-babies-pequerecet.name: Top 10 Blw Burgers For Babies
top-10-blw-burgers-for-babies-pequerecet.original_name: Las 10 mejores hamburguesas BLW para bebés

ingredients.item: 1 small potato, pitted and cut into cubes
50 g de pescado blanco (como el lenguado o la merluza), cocido y desmenuzado

instructions: Cooking the potato in boiling water till she's tender. Then scrape and clamp her into a bowl and get a soft purée.

Add the cooked and dementised white fish to the potato purée and mix well. You can use a fork to do that. Optional, add a pint of salt and olive oil to give flavour. If you are preparing this cheeseburger for a baby under 1 year old, it's best to omit salt.
Form small burgers with the right size for your baby. Pass the burgers through the frosted bread, make sure they are well covered.

Warm an anti-stick frying pan with medium heat and cook the potato and fish burgers for about 2 to 3 minutes from each side or until they are golden and cooked from inside. Let the burgers cool down before they serve your baby. Make sure they are at a secure temperature for their consumption.

tray-of-pork-and-pineapple-gratin-telecu.name: Tray Of Pork And Pineapple Gratin
tray-of-pork-and-pineapple-gratin-telecu.original_name: Tabuleiro de porco e ananás gratinado

ingredients.item: 800 g  carne de porco em cubos pequenos

instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into cubes; also cut the pineapple and pepper into cubes and reserve. Light a pot with the olive oil, add the chopped garlic teeth and let it saute.

Also pour the meat into the pot and let it saute until it becomes color. Add the wine, potatoes and pepper and season with salt, pyri and pepper paste. Add the water, cover and let it cook in mild heat, stirring from time to time for 15 minutes.
After the time indicated, add the pineapple and chopped cilantro. Shake and let cook for another 5 minutes. Retrieve the spices.
Put the meat on an oven tray. Mix the creams with grated cheese and lie on the meat. Take it in the oven, preheated to 200oC, until it's well gratined and golden. Serve with a mixed salad.

tteokbokki-korean-spicy-rice-cakes.name: Tteokbokki (korean Spicy Rice Cakes)
instructions: Combine water and anchovies in a saucepan; bring to a boil and cook for 10 minutes. Remove and discard anchovies; set anchovy water aside.
Combine chile paste, sugar, soy sauce, and corn syrup in a bowl.
Add rice cakes, onion, and chile paste mixture to anchovy water; bring to a boil and boil for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add spring onion; boil 3 minutes more.

turkey-roasted-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Turkey Roasted In The Oven

ingredients.item: 1 homemade fridge broth bouquet of herbs
1 homemade fridge broth bouquet of herbs

instructions: Heat the homemade broth in benmari with the bouquet of herbs, so that they melt slightly. Transfer to a bowl and add the soft butter and lots of pepper.
Take a quantity of the mixture and rub the inside of the turkey's belly.
Wash the potatoes and cut them in half. Add the mustard, bacon (1 slice) chopped and cheese. Mix well and fill the turkey belly with the mixture.
Spread two large pieces of foil (or four if the roll is small), crucifully, into a baking pan. Place the turkey on the foil, with the breast up.
Brush it very well with the butter mixture, making sure to use the whole quantity. Do not forget that it takes enough fat to cook properly and remain juicy.
Then cover her chest with bacon slices, until completely covered. The bacon protects the skin from intense baking and lubricates it so that the meat remains juicy and tender.

We wrap the turkey as a package, making sure there are no gaps. If necessary, repeat the wrapping to close well. Attention: Leave a little space between the poultry and the foil so that the skin becomes crispy. If the foil touches on it, it will contain moisture.
Bake in a preheated oven at 220.3.3. for 30 minutes. Then lower the temperature to 170°C and continue baking for 3 hours.
Carefully remove the baking pan from the oven and remove the fol. Turn up the temperature to 2003

Remove from oven and allow the turkey to stand for 30 minutes at room temperature. In this way he rests the roast and gradually recovers his fluids as the temperature drops. So the meat remains juicy and soft.
After rest, chop and serve the turkey

tuscan-lemonade-cocktail.name: Tuscan Lemonade Cocktail
instructions: Stir together lemon slices, lemonade concentrate, vodka, and limoncello in a large pitcher. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Add sparkling water to pitcher and serve over ice.
